title: guttenbergia umbellata
intro: Guttenbergia umbellata, also known as Queen of the Night, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, cold, and sore throats. The health benefits of Guttenbergia umbellata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as a natural antibacterial agent. Guttenbergia umbellata can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
